Description: A small office building located in Shenzhen, China. The building footprint is approximately 23.2 m (east-west) by 12.9 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 75 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 450.0 m^2 spread over 1 floor(s), giving roughly 300.0 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 3.4 m. The building is divided into 8 thermal zones in total (about 5 per floor). Typical space layout: open office + manager office + 2 meeting rooms + IT closet + restroom. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 30% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
